overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Horizon Forbidden West showing the protagonist Aloy walking along a mountain trail during golden hour. The character traverses from a dense rocky forest through to an open ridge overlooking a valley and lake, with warm sunset lighting throughout.

scene_state.functional_zone: rocky forest trail through pine trees

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the narrow forest trail, navigating between rocky outcrops and pine trees

entered.detail: large moss-covered rock formation forming the left wall of the trail
tall evergreen trees lining the path ahead
rocky hillside rising on the right side of the trail
narrow winding dirt trail through the mountain terrain

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a narrow dirt trail enclosed by rocky cliffs on the left and sloping terrain on the right. Tall pine trees line the path ahead, filtering the golden hour sunlight. The environment feels enclosed and forested with moderate vegetation density.

scene_state.functional_zone: mountain ridge trail with valley vista

events.description: forest opens up to reveal distant valley and mountain range ahead

agents.ego_description: continuing along the trail as the terrain opens to reveal a panoramic valley view

entered.detail: hazy mountain peaks visible on the horizon beyond the valley
wide open valley view opening up ahead of the trail
bush with distinctive red foliage beside the trail

segments.scene_description: The trail emerges from the enclosed forest onto an open mountain ridge. The view opens dramatically to reveal a distant mountain range and valley vista ahead. A distinctive red shrub appears on the left side of the path as the character continues walking along the widening trail.

events.description: lake becomes visible in the valley below to the left of the trail

agents.ego_description: walking along the ridge path with the lake and valley visible to the left side

entered.detail: body of water visible in the valley below the ridge
large boulder formation on the right side of the trail

segments.scene_description: The character continues along the open ridge trail with a panoramic view of the lake in the valley below to the left. The path winds between rocky outcrops on the right and the cliff edge overlooking the water. The distant mountains remain visible across the valley as the sun continues to set.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that transitions from an enclosed, forested mountain trail into a wide-open ridge overlooking a vast valley. It begins with the character walking along a narrow dirt path hemmed in by rocky cliffs and tall pine trees that filter the golden hour sunlight. As the character advances, the dense forest gives way to an open mountain ridge, dramatically expanding the view to reveal a distant mountain range and a distinctive red shrub along the widening trail. The scene then shifts to a panoramic vista as the path winds between rocky outcrops and the cliff edge, finally opening up to a sweeping view of a lake in the valley below under the glow of the setting sun.
